use_cases: Primary navigation for social media or content-sharing platforms
Sidebar or toolbar navigation with animated hover states
Bottom or top navigation bar for media-focused applications
Feature navigation for creative or content management tools
ai_summary: A colorful gradient navigation menu featuring circular icon buttons that animate on hover, expanding to reveal text labels with smooth gradient background transitions. Each menu item has its own unique gradient color scheme with a blur glow effect, creating a visually engaging and modern navigation experience suitable for media and social platforms.
